name: openEuler oVirt SIG
description: The oVirt SIG aims to be responsible for the planning, maintenance and upgrading of oVirt related software packages, and the migration, adaptation and optimization of oVirt on the different hardware platform.

name: openEuler oVirt SIG Repository List
description: openEuler oVirt SIG maintains 90 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler oVirt SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for The oVirt SIG aims to be responsible for the planning, maintenance and upgrading of oVirt related software packages, and the migration, adaptation and optimization of oVirt on the different hardware platform.. The SIG has 4 core members and maintains 90 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler oVirt SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler oVirt SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at ovirt@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler oVirt SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler oVirt SIG maintains 90 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/oVirt.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler oVirt SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler oVirt SIG has 4 Maintainers, including: Hou Jian, Wang Mian, Jiang Xinyu. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
